generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data capture"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for ego vehicle speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor for steering angle measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered object tracks from DBSCAN processing of LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, VehicleSteeringAngleDataTransmitted, LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds into object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based object tracking ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state monitoring ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote management ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D environment visualization ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Vehicle data report generation ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storage ROS2 package"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time viewing, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computation to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides CloudComputationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmdAction, DisableACCCmdAction, SetDesiredSpeedCmdAction, EmergencyBrakingCmdAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle environment for situational awareness"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable reports for vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReportInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Storage of vehicle state and object track data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report of vehicle state timeseries for operator and developer troubleshooting"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle environment for situational awareness"
]

instance CloudComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation results for ACC system"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data stored in SQL database for retrieval"
]

instance EnableACCCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSteeringAngleCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set steering angle via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor voltage control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo mechanisms for vehicle steering control"
]

instance JetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for wireless communication"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance TraxxasSlash110Vehicle : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor, VedderESC, SteeringServo, JetsonNXAntenna, JetsonOrinNano
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of motor voltage commands for speed control, steering commands, and emergency braking signals from digital twin to physical twin to actuate the vehicle."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms, as per 3GPP TS 22.185 and requirement R8."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensor data processing, actuation), Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC computation), User Entity (visualization, control panel), and Cross-System Entity (data translation), interconnected via ROS2 network and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation, validation) and operation phase (optimization, health monitoring), covering as designed and as operated representations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I functionality; validation against real-world vehicle data during testing."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; data serialized and translated via Data Translation FE; latency ≤100 ms per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin components on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity hosted externally (cloud or separate server); Data Storage on external device."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC control logic; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requirements include ≤100 ms end-to-end latency and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed in document."
]
